flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Palo Alto College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Palo Alto College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.1k → $10.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Palo Alto College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (7.6k → 8.8k).
